targets.rawSql: SELECT p.name AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM subscriptions s JOIN plans p ON p.id = s.plan_id WHERE s.status = 'active' GROUP BY p.name
SELECT SUM(p.price_monthly_cents) / 100.0 AS value FROM subscriptions s JOIN plans p ON p.id = s.plan_id WHERE s.status IN ('active', 'trialing')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM organizations WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT day AS time, SUM(qty) AS value FROM usage_aggregates_daily WHERE metric = 'mapping_runs' AND day >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, SUM(qty) AS value FROM usage_aggregates_daily WHERE metric = 'transform_requests' AND day >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

SELECT o.name, SUM(uad.qty) AS total_usage FROM usage_aggregates_daily uad JOIN organizations o ON o.id = uad.org_id WHERE uad.day >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY o.name ORDER BY total_usage DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT status AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM subscriptions GROUP BY status
